src: Monorepo home of graphile-build, graphile-build-pg, graphile-utils, postgraphile-core and graphql-parse-resolve-info. Build a high-performance easily-extensible GraphQL schema by combining plugins!
ja: graphile-build、graphile-build-pg、graphile-utils、postgraphile-core、graphql-parse-resolve-infoのモノレポ。プラグインを組み合わせて高性能で拡張しやすいGraphQLスキーマを構築！
